nameMeanings.name: Ishman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Isham  .

variants.name: Isham
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): habitational name from Isham, Northamptonshire. See   Isom  , compare   Esham  .

nameMeanings.name: Martha
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, of Aramaic rather than Hebrew origin, meaning ‘lady’. It was borne by the sister of Lazarus and Mary of Bethany (John 11:1). According to Luke 10:38, when Jesus visited the house of Mary and Martha, Mary sat at his feet, listening to him, while Martha ‘was cumbered about much serving’, so that she complained to Jesus, ‘Lord, dost thou not care that my sister hath left me to serve alone?’ For this reason, the name Martha has always been associated with hard domestic work, as opposed to the contemplative life.

en.lifeSummary: When Martha Ishman was born in 1110, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, her father, Ishman, was 20 and her mother, Ishman, was 20. She married Sir Richard Prescott about 1125, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1190, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

ko.lifeSummary: Martha Ishman(이)가 1110년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ishman(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ishman(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 Sir Richard Prescott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1190년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
